description: Verbatim log of every design question round: the questions asked, the options offered, and the answers as given (lightly copyedited). Explain-only exchanges are not logged.

questions.question: DQ1: What owns durability for a queue?

options.label: One SQLite file per tenant
options.description: One WAL per tenant; queues are tables. Isolation without file sprawl. (Recommended)

options.label: One shared file
options.description: Simplest possible layout, but every tenant shares one flush loop.

options.label: One file per queue
options.description: Maximum isolation; thousands of open files to manage.

options.label: Add to open list
options.description: I don't know yet — record it as an open question.

questions.question: DQ2: What do consumers get: at-least-once or exactly-once?

options.label: At-least-once (Recommended)
options.description: Duplicates possible on lease expiry; producers set idempotency keys.

options.label: Exactly-once
options.description: A dedup ledger in the hot path; consumers never see duplicates.

options.label: Add to open list
options.description: I don't know yet — record it as an open question.

questions.answer: At-least-once, but keep completed keys around so consumers can dedup cheaply

rounds.note: Spike V3 spun out of this round.

questions.question: DQ3: How do workers receive jobs?

options.label: Long-poll HTTP (Recommended)
options.description: Every worker runtime already speaks it; no new client library.

options.label: WebSockets
options.description: Lower per-dispatch overhead; a connection lifecycle to manage everywhere.

options.label: Plain polling
options.description: Trivial clients; latency and load scale with the poll interval.

options.label: Add to open list
options.description: I don't know yet — record it as an open question.

questions.question: Which delivery features are in scope for v1?

options.label: Retries with backoff
options.description: Failed jobs re-queue with exponential backoff.

options.label: Dead-letter queues
options.description: Jobs that exhaust retries land somewhere inspectable.

options.label: Scheduled jobs
options.description: Enqueue now, run at a future time.

options.label: Add to open list
options.description: I don't know yet — record it as an open question.

questions.answer: Retries with backoff, Add to open list
questions.note: Scheduled jobs recorded as Q2 rather than decided here.
